nasb.text: They brought every man his gift, articles of silver and gold, garments, weapons, spices, horses and mules, so much year by year.

esv.text: Every one of them brought his present, articles of silver and of gold, garments, myrrh, spices, horses, and mules, so much year by year.

cnv.text: 他們各人帶來的禮物有：銀器、金器、衣服、兵器、香料、騾馬；每年都有一定的數量。

ccb.text: 他们年年都带来礼物，有金银器皿、衣服、兵器、香料和骡马。
